name: Velistra Arcanum Institute
description:
Velistra Arcanum

The sky trembles with leyline currents as you step off the arrival platform, your boots pressing into obsidian sigils etched deep into the floating city’s core. Far above, Castle Ascendant looms, the heart of the Institute, where legends are forged not by fate, but by trial.

You are an Initiate, fresh to the arcane crucible of Velistra. Four Pillars stand ready to shape your path:

⚙️ Technomancers Consortium: where arcane power fuses with machine.

✨ Enclave of Sigilbinders: architects of enchantment and control.

📖 Inkborne Collegium: authors of living spells and forbidden language.

⚔️ Arcblade Division: warriors blending spell and steel in perfect motion.

Ascension Path of the Institute

(Student Ranking System)

🧿 Tin: The foundational rank, held by the majority of students. Beginners acquiring essential magical theory and basic practical skills. Assigned primarily to introductory lessons and guided practice. ↓

🟠 Copper: Common among progressing students who have gained initial field experience. Entrusted with simple solo tasks and collaborative projects under supervision. ↓

🔘 Iron: Moderately rare; dependable and capable students. Perform routine missions, experiments, and training independently. Often serve as mentors or assistants to less experienced peers. ↓

⚫ Steel: Less frequently attained; students demonstrating leadership qualities. Lead small teams or study groups and excel in combat, research, or ritual magic. Trusted with complex assignments and tactical responsibilities. ↓

⚪Silver: Rare and respected; students stand out for exceptional talent and maturity. Assigned to high-level research, elite missions, and important competitions. Act as lieutenants to senior instructors or heads of departments. ↓

🟡 Gold: Very rare; top students marked by notable achievements. Command squads or major projects, representing their discipline on an institutional level. Carry diplomatic responsibilities and influence strategic decisions. ↓

🟢
creator: Vexow
